zh.Canongate Kirk Session, Edinburgh, Midlo: 英國蘇格蘭艾丁波卡農蓋特
zh.Canongate, Edinburgh, Midlothian, Scotla: 英國蘇格蘭艾丁波卡農蓋特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix Hill於1520年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，她的父親James Corant Hill20歲，母親Isobell Crichton20歲。她於1550年12月16日與John Morrison II在蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1568年6月14日在她的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix Hill于1520年出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，她的父亲James Corant Hill20岁，母亲Isobell Crichton20岁。她于1550年12月16日与John Morrison II在苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1568年6月14日在她的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix Hill was born in 1520, in Edinburgh, Scotland, her father, James Corant Hill, was 20 and her mother, Isobell Crichton, was 20. She married John Morrison II on 16 December 1550, in Edinburgh, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 14 June 1568, in her hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix Hill est née en 1520, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, James Corant Hill, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isobell Crichton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Morrison II le 16 décembre 1550, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 14 juin 1568, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Edinburgh, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix Hill 1520 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Corant Hill 20 und ihre Mutter Isobell Crichton 20. Sie hat am 16. Dezember 1550 in Edinburgh, Scotland John Morrison II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 14. Juni 1568 im Alter von 48 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Edinburgh, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Hill è nata il nel 1520 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, sua padre, James Corant Hill, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Isobell Crichton, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Morrison II il 16 dicembre 1550, nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 giugno 1568, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Edinburgh, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix Hillが1520年にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父James Corant Hillは20歳，母Isobell Crichtonは20歳であった。1550年12月16日にスコットランドエディンブルグでJohn Morrison IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1568年6月14日に故郷で48歳で死去し，スコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix Hill(이)가 1520년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Corant Hill(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isobell Crichton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1550년 12월 16일 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 John Morrison II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1568년 6월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Hill nasceu em 1520, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, James Corant Hill, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Isobell Crichton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Morrison II em 16 de dezembro de 1550, em Edinburgh, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 14 de junho de 1568, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Edinburgh, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix Hill родилась в 1520 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, её отцу по имени James Corant Hill было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isobell Crichton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Morrison II 16 декабря 1550 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 14 июня 1568 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности эдинбург, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix Hill nació en 1520, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, James Corant Hill, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Isobell Crichton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Morrison II el 16 de diciembre de 1550, en Edinburgh, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de junio de 1568, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Edinburgh, Scotland.
